introText: Find programs to help lower prescription drug costs in Alabama. Learn about Medicare Extra Help, state pharmaceutical assistance, and patient assistance programs.
spapDescription: Alabama's state pharmaceutical assistance program helps eligible residents afford prescription medications.
spapEligibility: Income-based eligibility; contact program for details

programs.name: Medicare Extra Help (Low-Income Subsidy)
programs.description: Helps pay Part D premiums, deductibles, and copays

programs.name: Alabama SPAP
programs.description: Alabama's state pharmaceutical assistance program

programs.name: NeedyMeds
programs.description: Database of patient assistance programs from drug manufacturers

programs.name: RxAssist
programs.description: Comprehensive database of prescription assistance programs

discountPrograms.name: GoodRx
discountPrograms.description: Free prescription discount card accepted at most pharmacies

discountPrograms.name: Medicare Part D
discountPrograms.description: Compare Part D plans for your specific medications

faqs.question: What prescription assistance programs are available in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Alabama residents can access Medicare Extra Help, state pharmaceutical assistance programs, manufacturer patient assistance programs, and discount cards.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office.

faqs.question: What prescription assistance programs are available in Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Wisconsin residents can access Medicare Extra Help, state pharmaceutical assistance programs, manufacturer patient assistance programs, and discount cards.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office.

introText: Find programs to help lower prescription drug costs in Wyoming. Learn about Medicare Extra Help, state pharmaceutical assistance, and patient assistance programs.
spapDescription: Wyoming's state pharmaceutical assistance program helps eligible residents afford prescription medications.
spapEligibility: Income-based eligibility; contact program for details
